message:
fix(projects): add missing animate prop to grid items

The BentoGrid child motion.div elements had `initial="hidden"` but were
missing `animate="visible"`. This caused projects to remain invisible
(opacity: 0, y: 24, scale: 0.95) on initial page load.

The animation only triggered when a filter change caused re-render,
which is why clicking "Rust Ports" or any other filter made projects
appear.

Root cause: Framer Motion variants require both `initial` and `animate`
props on each element to trigger the state transition. The parent
container's `animate="visible"` doesn't automatically propagate to
children when they have their own `initial` prop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
